footer.tagline: Human behavior isn't guessed. It's measured. Research built on latent signals, applied biometrics, and direct observation.
footer.poip_desc: Real-time monitoring and analysis of public opinion through latent behavioral signals.
footer.mirror_desc: A free self-knowledge tool through facial structure observation.

home.meta_desc: Institute for Behavioral Studies & Biometrics Research. Surveys, applied biometrics, UX research and the Behavioral Mirror.
home.hero_sub: ICSCB combines public opinion surveys, applied biometrics, and latent signal analysis to produce authentic understanding — not predictions, but rigorous observation.
home.pillar1_desc: We monitor large public discourse corpora and extract latent behavioral signals — patterns that don't appear in statements, but exist in the structure of language.
home.pillar2_desc: Eye-tracking, GSR, and facial expression analysis to measure what happens below the threshold of awareness — in advertising, UX, and product testing.
home.pillar3_desc: The Behavioral Mirror — a self-knowledge tool that applies facial mapping to offer an orientational reading of character and present-moment state.
home.research_upcoming_desc: Monthly monitoring of latent behavioral signals from public discourse — comparative analysis by topic and institutional actors.
home.mirror_sub: Using the same facial mapping technology used in applied biometric research, the Mirror identifies character tendencies and offers starting points for personal practice. Free, anonymous, no data stored.
home.mirror_disclaimer: Orientational tool, not a diagnosis. Local processing — zero data stored.
home.service1_desc: Representative quantitative research at national or regional level, with CAWI/CATI methodology and ESOMAR compliance.
home.service2_desc: Eye-tracking (Tobii Pro), GSR, and micro-expression analysis for testing advertising, packaging, and product experiences.
home.service3_desc: User testing (moderated/unmoderated), card sorting, tree testing, and heuristic audits for digital products.
home.service4_desc: Monitoring public discourse through the Calypso platform for detecting latent behavioral patterns.
home.cta_title: Do you have a research project?
home.cta_sub: We discuss objectives, target audience, and the right methodology. We respond within 48 hours.

servicii.meta_desc: Public opinion surveys, biometrics & neuromarketing, UX research, and behavioral signal analysis.
servicii.title: Applied research services
servicii.sub: From representative surveys to laboratory biometrics and latent signal analysis from public discourse — each method is chosen because it best answers the question.
servicii.cta_sub: Each study starts from your objective. We discuss the right methodology and build the proposal together.

cercetare.meta_desc: Technical articles based on behavioral signals collected through the Calypso monitoring platform.
cercetare.title: Research & Publications
cercetare.sub: Technical articles based on behavioral signals from our monitoring corpus. Not opinion — documented observation.
cercetare.upcoming_desc: Monthly monitoring of latent behavioral signals from public discourse. Comparative analysis by topic and institutional actors.
cercetare.newsletter_text: Subscribe to receive ICSCB publications directly to your inbox.

oglinda.meta_desc: A self-knowledge tool based on observing facial structure and expression. Free, no account, no data stored.
oglinda.badge: Free · No account · No data stored
oglinda.title: Behavioral
oglinda.hero_p1: A self-knowledge tool based on observing facial structure and expression. Not a personality test. Not a diagnosis. An invitation to observation.
oglinda.hero_p2: Using the same facial mapping technology used in applied biometric research, the Mirror identifies character tendencies and offers starting points for personal practice.
oglinda.notice: The Mirror is not a personality test, does not make medical or psychological diagnoses, and does not produce certainties. All results are formulated as orientational — a starting point for reflection, not a final conclusion.
oglinda.how_sub: You don't need an account, an installed app, or special settings. Just a browser, a camera, and a few minutes of attention.
oglinda.step1_desc: Place your face in the center of the visual field. The camera automatically detects facial presence and guides you with real-time quality hints.
oglinda.step2_desc: Press «Analyze». The tool captures 60 reference frames and calculates structural ratios and the expressive profile — locally, in your browser.
oglinda.step3_desc: You receive the predominant character profile, active zones, face shape, and a recommendation aligned with the practice direction you choose.
oglinda.levels_title: A profile with four levels of reading
oglinda.level1_desc: The main archetype detected from facial structure — with the specific gift, possible shadow, depth need, and practice path.
oglinda.level2_desc: The forehead, eyes, jaw, and lips — each with its own reading of the present-moment state and a reflection question.
oglinda.level3_desc: The base geometry: oval, round, square, heart, elongated, diamond, triangle, or harmonious — with the associated interpretation.
oglinda.level4_desc: You choose a direction to cultivate (calm, clarity, courage, expression...) and receive a personalized recommendation for today's practice.
oglinda.privacy1: The camera operates exclusively in-browser — zero video data sent to server
oglinda.privacy3: No account, no storage, no tracking
oglinda.privacy4: Results disappear when the tab is closed
oglinda.privacy_note: Camera access requires HTTPS. icscb.org runs on HTTPS, so the tool works directly in your browser, on both desktop and mobile.
oglinda.cta_sub: The tool loads in the browser. You need a camera and 3-5 minutes of attention. No recording, no account.

sesiune.cta_hint: Look naturally toward the camera, with your face centered in the oval. The tool captures 60 frames before analysis.

reading.label: Reading
reading.direction_title: What do you want to cultivate today?
reading.direction_sub: Choose a direction and you will receive a practice recommendation adapted to the current observation.
reading.disclaimer: This observation is orientational in nature. It does not constitute a medical or psychological diagnosis. All data is processed locally and is not stored or transmitted.

despre.meta_desc: Institute for Behavioral Studies & Biometrics Research — mission, methodology, values, and our perspective on applied behavioral research.
despre.title: Institute for Behavioral Studies & Biometrics Research
despre.hero_sub: ICSCB is an applied research institute specializing in understanding human behavior — through latent signals from public discourse, applied biometrics, direct observation, and self-knowledge instruments.
despre.mission_title: Making better decisions through a deeper understanding of people
despre.team_sub: The ICSCB team combines expertise in cognitive psychology, sociology, computational neuroscience, and research design. Individual profiles are in preparation.

metodologie.meta_desc: How we conduct our studies: CAWI/CATI surveys, biometrics with eye-tracking and GSR, UX research, and behavioral signal analysis.
metodologie.title: Transparent methodology, verifiable results
metodologie.sub: Every ICSCB study follows clear protocols, validated instruments, and international research standards.
metodologie.standards_sub: ICSCB research adheres to the ethics codes and quality standards of the leading international professional organizations.
metodologie.cta_sub: Our research team responds in detail.

rapoarte.meta_desc: Public research reports by ICSCB: opinion surveys, biometric studies, behavioral analyses.
rapoarte.title: Reports & Open Data
rapoarte.sub: We periodically publish research results to contribute to public knowledge and informed debate.
rapoarte.coming_soon_desc: Our report library opens during 2026. Below you can preview the reports in preparation. Subscribe to the newsletter to be notified at launch.
rapoarte.cta_sub: Beyond public reports, we conduct dedicated research — surveys, biometric studies, or UX research — customized to your objectives.
